docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY FOWLER, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOWLER, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FOWLER, JANET
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KIT WONG (CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF JANET FOWLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS KIT WONG. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOWLER, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
